user.title: Connect to kSplitFlap
user.description: Enter the network address and API key for your kSplitFlap server.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the machine running the board server (e.g. 192.168.1.42).
data_description.port: TCP port the Express server is listening on (default 3000).
data_description.api_key: The API_KEY value set in the board server's .env file.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the board server. Check the host, port, and that the server is running.
error.invalid_auth: The API key was rejected. Verify the API_KEY in your server's .env file.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

set_static_message.name: Set Static Message
set_static_message.description: Display a static message on the kSplitFlap.

lines.name: Lines
lines.description: List of text lines to display on the board.

clear_static_message.name: Clear Static Message
clear_static_message.description: Remove the static message from the kSplitFlap.

add_quote.name: Add Quote
add_quote.description: Add a new quote to the kSplitFlap quote library.

delete_quote.name: Delete Quote
delete_quote.description: Remove a quote from the kSplitFlap library by ID.

quote_id.name: Quote ID
quote_id.description: The unique ID of the quote to delete.

set_location.name: Set Location
set_location.description: Set the location used for weather data in dashboard mode.

name.name: Display Name
name.description: Location name shown on the board (e.g. AUSTIN, TX).
